userMessage: Set CH1 1V DC 50ohm, CH2 500mV AC, edge trigger CH1 rising 0.5V normal mode, single acquisition, add frequency amplitude pk2pk on CH1, query all results, save CH1 waveform as binary and take a screenshot.
